name: Sweet Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients (except topping ingredients) together and pour into a buttered 9 x 9 dish.
2. Mix pecans, brown sugar, and flour. Sprinkle mixture over the top of the potato mixture.
3. Pour melted margarine evenly over the sugar mixture.
4. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
